message:
🐛 Fix missing Demo badge on benchmark cards when fetch fails (#921)

Pass isLiveDataAvailable: !isFailed to useCardDemoState in all 6
benchmark cards so they correctly show Demo badge and yellow border
when the backend returns an error (e.g. Drive API not enabled).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
